channel.title: Unable to compile TypeScript
channel.description: I am getting this error while deploying my code to vercel ``` Error: ⨯ Unable to compile TypeScript: 17:57:19.236 error TS6046: Argument for '--jsx' option must be: 'preserve', 'react-native', 'react'. 17:57:19.236 error TS5023: Unknown compiler option 'jsxImportSource'. ```

item.title: Unable to compile TypeScript
item.dc:creator: abhishek.kumar
item.description:
I am getting this error while deploying my code to vercel

Error: ⨯ Unable to compile TypeScript:
17:57:19.236 error TS6046: Argument for '--jsx' option must be: 'preserve', 'react-native', 'react'.
17:57:19.236 error TS5023: Unknown compiler option 'jsxImportSource'.

Read full topic
